issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but missing condition check for LeaderHasType {Big Mom Pirates}
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Effect specifies trashing from Life cards (top of deck used as life), not hand. Should use 'ForceDiscard' or similar for life pile, or clarify mechanic

Missing conditional thenActions: Should check LeaderHasType {Big Mom Pirates}, then if true, execute SearchDeck (add 1 from top of deck to top of Life) with duration DuringYourTurn (end of turn timing)
Missing 'Once Per Turn' constraint - should add 'limit: 1' or frequency tracking
Condition structure missing: needs condition 'LeaderHasType' with value {Big Mom Pirates} before executing thenActions

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards: If your Leader has the {Big Mom Pirates} type, add 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards at the end of this turn.
